canonical_answer: A hand holds silver scissors to cut a strip of white cloth tape. Two large transparent measuring cups with white lids sit side-by-side on a light surface. The hand applies the tape horizontally around the middle of one beaker near the 300ml marking. Two small clear bottles with white caps are positioned behind the large cups.

question: What entities are present and what are they doing on the counter?
canonical_answer: Two large clear plastic measuring cups with blue volume markings stand on a light-colored countertop. A pair of black-handled scissors rests near a roll of white medical tape. Two small transparent bottles containing liquid are arranged behind the larger containers. A blue wall and brown door frame form the background behind the setup.
